information.notes:
Popularized within Night City by 6th Street, sandbag fortifications are a fast, durable way to entrench a position. Usually around 1 meter high and 2-4 meters wide, sandbag emplacements provide cover against conventional gunfire where there otherwise wouldn't be any. In this case, the sandbags have been carefully folded into a large rucksack. While extraordinarily heavy, most 6th Streeters are capable of carrying such a bag over a short distance - once set down, unzipping the bag allows the fortification to fall into place. While placed, a line of sandbags provides an extra layer of thick stone between whatever's behind it, and whatever's in front of it.

Placing a line of sandbags requires an action, after which they cannot be moved again without taking 10 minutes to re-package them. Passing over them requires an additional 2 MOVE (reduced to 1 with a total Athletics score of 15 or more)

Token and art by Mattew Reger - find him on Instagram at kingof.roses (link).
